blocks.code:
(set-random-seed! 42)
(define target (list 1 2 3 4 5))
(define (fitness candidate)
  (define n (min (length candidate) (length target)))
  (define (match i acc)
    (if (>= i n) acc
        (match (+ i 1)
               (if (= (nth candidate i) (nth target i)) (+ acc 1) acc))))
  (match 0 0))
(define (random-list n)
  (if (= n 0) (list)
      (append (list (random 10)) (random-list (- n 1)))))
(define (mutate lst)
  (define idx (random (length lst)))
  (append (take lst idx) (list (random 10)) (drop lst (+ idx 1))))
(define (evolve pop gen)
  (define scored (sort (map (lambda (c) (list c (fitness c))) pop)
                       (lambda (a b) (> (nth a 1) (nth b 1)))))
  (define best-entry (nth scored 0))
  (define best-candidate (nth best-entry 0))
  (define best-fitness (nth best-entry 1))
  (if (or (= best-fitness 5) (>= gen 200))
      (list (list "generations" gen)
            (list "best" best-candidate)
            (list "fitness" best-fitness)
            (list "target" target))
      (let ((top-3 (take scored 3)))
        (evolve
          (append
            (map (lambda (p) (nth p 0)) top-3)
            (map (lambda (p) (mutate (nth p 0))) top-3)
            (list (random-list 5) (random-list 5))
            (map (lambda (p) (mutate (mutate (nth p 0)))) top-3))
          (+ gen 1)))))
(define initial (map (lambda (i) (random-list 5)) (range 0 8)))
(evolve initial 0)

(define (mutate lst)

(define (evolve pop gen)
